events.title: Annual Conference 2025
events.subtitle: Plato, Aristotle, Presocratics, and Stoicism.
events.description: The 2025 SAGP Annual Conference brings scholars together for four thematic sessions over two days, each moderated by a senior scholar and centered on original research in Ancient Greek philosophy.

attendance.instructions: To attend via Zoom, contact apreus@binghamton.edu, indicating which event or events you wish to attend by day and time.

hero.title: Plato, Aristotle, Presocratics, and Stoicism.
hero.subtitle: November 15–16, 2025 · via Zoom · All times listed in Pacific Standard Time.

events.detail: The 2025 SAGP Annual Conference brings scholars together for four thematic sessions over two days, each moderated by a senior scholar and centered on original research in Ancient Greek philosophy.

events.title: 2025 Distinguished Lectureship
events.description: André Laks is Professor Emeritus of Ancient Philosophy at the University of Paris-Sorbonne and at Princeton University, now teaching at the Universidad Panamericana, México City.

attendance.instructions: This event will be held via Zoom. To register, email apreus@binghamton.edu.

hero.title: André Laks
hero.subtitle: “The kouros’ descent. A methodical reading of Parmenides’ route of search?”

events.detail: André Laks is Professor Emeritus of Ancient Philosophy at the University of Paris-Sorbonne and at Princeton University, now teaching at the Universidad Panamericana, México City.

events.title: 2024 Distinguished Lectureship
events.description: Professor Sir Geoffrey Lloyd is Emeritus Professor of Ancient Philosophy and Science at the University of Cambridge.

attendance.instructions: This event was held via Zoom.

hero.title: Professor Sir Geoffrey Lloyd
hero.subtitle: “What is the Use of Ancient Philosophy?”

events.detail: Professor Sir Geoffrey Lloyd is Emeritus Professor of Ancient Philosophy and Science at the University of Cambridge.

events.title: Annual Conference 2024
events.subtitle: Pre-Socratics, Plato, Aristotle, and the Stoics.
events.description: The 2024 Annual Conference explored four major areas of Ancient Greek philosophy through themed panel discussions bringing together scholars from universities around the world.

attendance.instructions: To attend via Zoom, contact apreus@binghamton.edu, indicating which session or sessions you wish to attend.

hero.title: Pre-Socratics, Plato, Aristotle, and the Stoics.
hero.subtitle: November 16–17, 2024 · via Zoom · All times listed in Pacific Standard Time.

events.detail: The 2024 Annual Conference explored four major areas of Ancient Greek philosophy through themed panel discussions bringing together scholars from universities around the world.

events.title: 2023 Distinguished Lectureship
events.description: Tony Long is Chancellor’s Distinguished Professor Emeritus of Classics and Affiliated Professor of Philosophy at the University of California, Berkeley.

attendance.instructions: This lecture was rescheduled from 2023 and held via Zoom.

hero.title: Tony Long
hero.subtitle: “The Stoic Zeus and the Values of Nature”

events.detail: Tony Long is Chancellor’s Distinguished Professor Emeritus of Classics and Affiliated Professor of Philosophy at the University of California, Berkeley.

events.title: 2022 Distinguished Lectureship

attendance.instructions: This event was held via Zoom.

hero.title: Dorothea Frede
hero.subtitle: “Aristotle’s ‘Political Architect’ and the City of His Prayers”

events.detail: Dorothea Frede is Professor Emerita of Philosophy at Hamburg University.
